title: どちらも日常なんだよね～

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Okay, here's mine... Your turn, Fine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Then I'm going to... Oh, I know! Okay, I'll go with
this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear lively voices coming from one of the
classrooms as I'm walking through the academy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You sound like you're having fun. Are you playing
a game?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We're drawing pictures of things that start
with the letters of the alphabet, like this...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. So that's "ramen," right? Well it's a nice
picture, but I already did one for "R"! Remember
my rabbit?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, whoops! Well, I guess I'm out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Fine sure loves ramen.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
She really does! Between that and her being super
friendly, it really makes you forget she's from an
aristocratic family.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You think so? But isn't everyone enchanted by a
good bowl of ramen? All those noodles tangled
up in the shop's special broth, and—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Is there anything besides ramen that
you're really into?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Um, let's see... Yeah, actually! I've been getting
into photography lately!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It's so fun to whip your phone out, go tap tap ☆ and just casually capture a nice little memory. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Casually? Was it difficult to take pictures back
home?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Weeell, as a matter of fact, it was. But back then,
the way we did things felt totally normal to me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for keeping you all waiting. I've come
in my Tracen Academy uniform, so shall we take
some commemorative photos?

text_block_list.name: Head Maid
text_block_list.text:
This way, Your Highness. We'll take the pictures
just as soon as we've applied your makeup. Lights!
Camera! Security!

text_block_list.name: Attendant
text_block_list.text: Yes, right here! The reflector is in position!

text_block_list.name: Security
text_block_list.text:
Eagle Squad! Assume photography positions and
provide security from above!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
We need to get some with me in my tracksuit as
well. I'd like everybody to get a glimpse of the
sort of culture I'll be experiencing.

text_block_list.name: Head Maid
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'll fetch the shoes we made to fit Your
Highness's feet.

text_block_list.name: Security
text_block_list.text:
Hound Squad, do you copy? Assume diamond
formation with Her Highness at the center! Run
alongside the camera crew!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for the inconvenience. Thank you very
much for your service.

text_block_list.name: Security
text_block_list.text: Our pleasure!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...You know, that kind of thing? Everyone had to
work quite hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That was beyond anything I could ever imagine...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and it's so fun being able to show everyone
the pictures you've taken right away. Actually,
just recently...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a sec. Fine! I'm looking at your
Umastagram followers and... is this?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
A flood of likes from celebrities I've seen on TV...
on a picture of veggie-loaded ramen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding-dong, ding-dong ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's the school bell. Agh, I have to clean
the blackboard!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I feel like I've been treated to a glimpse of a
completely different world.
